canonical_answer: At 0s, the Rubio Monocoat logo appears on a white background; at 4s, a person wearing black gloves wipes a wooden table with a white cloth; at 10s, the person uses a black orbital sander with a vacuum hose on the surface; at 16s, the person switches to vacuuming the table with a black attachment.
